label: Low-access tract (1 mi)
definition: Flag for low-access tract at 1 mile. (Result column: LATracts1.)

label: Low-income & low-access tract (1/10 mi)
definition: Flag for low-income, low-access tracts at 1 mile (urban) / 10 miles (rural). (Result column: LILATracts_1And10.)

label: Low-income tract
definition: Flag for low-income tract. (Result column: LowIncomeTracts.)

label: Low-vehicle-access tract
definition: Flag for a tract where >=100 households have no vehicle and are beyond half a mile from a supermarket. (Result column: HUNVFlag.)
